scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace worker
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy --workspace worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace worker
scripts.dev: node scripts/run-parallel.mjs "frontend:npm run dev --workspace frontend" "worker:npm run dev --workspace worker"
scripts.dev:cloudflare: node scripts/run-parallel.mjs "assets:npm run build:watch --workspace frontend" "worker:npm run dev --workspace worker"
